text.message: I guess the 6 ore is always our block blue

Hahah this is fun, I rarely meet anyone I know of from the leaderboard

Blue I’ll give u 1:1 ore if u protect my 6?
when i roll a seven/play knight?
Yup. So every 6 , 1 ore gets earmarked for u
Unlocking the 6 ore is gg for black
No but if I give him 1 ore every 6 it spreads the love
Man solo is tough, I don’t have a 2 point play anywhere
W dont need to spread the love right now, we need to work together to try and stop you somehow
No army or road contender as of now
Ya but can’t over steal based on possibility
Ya u shud have another city if an 8 rolls now
lol 4th time in a row I have no resources going into my turn

I hoped u had a knight
